prompt_used: Story: Ward 1908 (ward-1908) | Hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. | Subgenre: haunted institution | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing | Villain: The Record Keeper | Villain worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention. | Motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. Compose ending score cue for "Corruption Pact" that supports summary "You seal records permanently in exchange for temporary peace." and epilogue "You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.".
